subcodes.first_line: O ye two handmaidens of God! The condition of servitude to the Blessed Beauty is possession of the realm of detachment and purity and sanctification from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو کنیز حق شرط کنیزی جمال مبارک ملکیت کشور انقطاعست و تنزیه و تقدیس از
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @transcending the material condition, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
